content: User wants to compare a list of desired skills, knowledge, and qualifications for an Instructional Designer with a job description from LinkedIn Jobs and produce a report indicating matches with quotes.

dimension.purpose: to produce a report indicating matches between desired skills and job description

relation.subject: User
relation.object: comparison of desired skills with job description

evidence_span: Goal: Compare a list of desired skills, knowledge, and qualifications for an Instructional Designer with a job description for an Instructional Designer position found on LinkedIn Jobs.
assistant_replies:
Report:

1. MATCH: "This Instructional Designer will be responsible for working closely with faculty or business subject matter experts to design, create, and deliver online, blended and instructor-led classroom training courses and documentation using principles and practices of instructional design and adult learning theory." (Item 1 and 2)
2. MATCH: "Conduct learning and business needs analysis" (Item 3)
3. MATCH: "Devise modes of assessment to measure the effectiveness of the course" (Item 8)
4. MATCH: "Write effective copy, instructional materials, and audio/video scrips to help participants meet learning objectives" (Item 12)
5. MATCH: "Use e-learning authoring tools to upload instructional content to websites, e-learning platforms, or learning management systems" (Item 47)

Note: Items 3, 4, 6, 9-11, 13-15, 16, 18-22, 25-26, 28-29, 31-36, 38-41, 44-50, 52-54 and 56 were not found in the job description.

content: User provided a list of 56 desired skills, knowledge, and qualifications for an Instructional Designer.

relation.subject: User
relation.object: list of 56 desired skills for Instructional Designer

evidence_span: List of desired skills, knowledge, and qualifications: "1. Instructional design models & principles ... 56. Twenty-first-century skills frameworks (e.g. P21)"

Report:

3. MATCH: "Devise modes of assessment to measure the effectiveness of the course" (Item 8)
4. MATCH: "Write effective copy, instructional materials, and audio/video scrips to help participants meet learning objectives" (Item 12)
5. MATCH: "Use e-learning authoring tools to upload instructional content to websites, e-learning platforms, or learning management systems" (Item 47)

Note: Items 3, 4, 6, 9-11, 13-15, 16, 18-22, 25-26, 28-29, 31-36, 38-41, 44-50, 52-54 and 56 were not found in the job description.

content: User provided a job description for an Instructional Designer position at an Ivy League university in Boston, hybrid, 6-month contract.

relation.subject: User
relation.object: job description for Instructional Designer at Ivy League university

evidence_span: Job description from LinkedIn: "Our client, a prestigious Ivy League university, is actively looking for an Instructional Designer to join their team in Boston! This role is hybrid so local candidates are required. This is a 6 month initial contract with the opportunity to extend or convert"
assistant_replies:
Report:

1. MATCH: "This Instructional Designer will be responsible for working closely with faculty or business subject matter experts to design, create, and deliver online, blended and instructor-led classroom training courses and documentation using principles and practices of instructional design and adult learning theory." (Item 1 and 2)
2. MATCH: "Conduct learning and business needs analysis" (Item 3)
3. MATCH: "Devise modes of assessment to measure the effectiveness of the course" (Item 8)
4. MATCH: "Write effective copy, instructional materials, and audio/video scrips to help participants meet learning objectives" (Item 12)
5. MATCH: "Use e-learning authoring tools to upload instructional content to websites, e-learning platforms, or learning management systems" (Item 47)

Note: Items 3, 4, 6, 9-11, 13-15, 16, 18-22, 25-26, 28-29, 31-36, 38-41, 44-50, 52-54 and 56 were not found in the job description.
